bowNoise.method: f0 harmonic subtraction + same-dynamic/string cross-pitch median

excluded.reason: lossy coding corrupts low-level broadband noise floors

bandEvidence.floorMethod: quietest 20% of STFT frames in each source Iowa run
bandEvidence.lowerLimitReason: lowest 1/6-octave centre retained with robust multi-bin resolution at nfft=4096
bandEvidence.upperLimitReason: last complete analysed 1/6-octave centre below 16 kHz

artifactScreen.vibrato: Iowa arco non-vibrato only; no vibrato smear admitted
